feature_tested: EchoAi³ Layers 4-5, Collective Intelligence, Ripple, Governance, Digital Twin, ChatGPT-style Sidebar
summary: Comprehensive testing of 6 new backend engines (Collective, Simulation, Adaptive, Ripple, Governance, Digital Twin) and the redesigned EchoAi³ Canvas with ChatGPT-style sidebar. All 27 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all key elements present and functional.

endpoints: GET /api/echoai3/collective/status - mesh status, categories, isolation level
POST /api/echoai3/collective/contribute - extract and contribute anonymized patterns
GET /api/echoai3/twin/state - full twin state with health score
GET /api/echoai3/twin/state/kitchen - kitchen twin with station utilization

verified_elements: session-sidebar - ChatGPT-style sidebar with date-grouped sessions
heartbeat-panel - vital signs display (EBITDA, Food Cost, Labor, Covers, Inv Health, Revenue)
ui_features_verified: ChatGPT-style sidebar with date grouping (Today/Yesterday/Previous 7 Days)
New Session button creates fresh session
Clicking session loads its messages as Briefing Cards
Subsystem status indicators in sidebar footer (Collective, Simulation, Twin, Governance, Adaptive, Ripple)
Heartbeat vital signs display on empty state
EchoAi³ think endpoint works end-to-end from UI
Briefing cards show domain tag, intent type, confidence, data completeness, sources

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 new EchoAi³ engines (Collective, Simulation, Adaptive, Ripple, Governance, Digital Twin) are fully functional. The ChatGPT-style sidebar UI is working with date-grouped sessions, search, collapse/expand, and subsystem status footer. The /think endpoint works end-to-end from the UI. Collective must be enabled via POST /settings before contributing patterns. Toast POS and QuickBooks integrations remain MOCKED with demo/sandbox data.
notes: Panel loading had a transient error on first attempt but worked on retry. This appears to be a dynamic module loading timing issue, not a code bug.
